title: Compile live profiles into harness fragments
body:
## Summary
- add `ap compile <profile> --baseline <dir> --out <dir>` fragment compilation
- write harness-scoped fragment directories and a compiled manifest with symbolic and resolved target roots
- cover live profile compilation with the requested command-level test

## Test
- `uv run --project agent-profile pytest agent-profile/tests/test_compile_command.py`

expanded scope: agent-profile/agent_profile/cli.py — required to route `ap compile live --baseline <scratch> --out <cache>` to the compiler
